title: 40 scents is the problem (contrarian)
hook: A wall of 40 candle scents isn't choice. It's a chore.
body:
You came to relax and now you're doing homework: top notes, mid notes, dry-down. By the time you pick one, the calm's gone.

We make 3. Each one built for a different room-mood, not a different perfume. Pick by how you want the room to feel, light it, done.

Fewer decisions is the whole point.
cta: Save this for the next time a 40-scent wall makes your eyes glaze over.
sourceInsight: Contrarian take against scent-overwhelm; matches 'what we're against' in brand identity (demo).
